workflows.label: Audit Owner Chain
workflows.description: Map the real owner files before implementation and identify duplicate ownership or orphaned modules.

workflows.label: Patch Owner File
workflows.description: Apply the smallest source-level edit to the owning file without local compensation.

workflows.label: Verify Runtime
workflows.description: Run syntax checks, browser checks, or route-level verification against the changed surface.

workflows.label: Prepare Handoff
workflows.description: Record changed files, remaining blockers, and the next exact file to open.
